title: Memory Constellation
description: Capture private memories locally, explore their connections as a 3D constellation, and revisit every moment in an accessible timeline.

prompt.objective: Build a private local memory archive with a navigable 3D constellation and accessible timeline.

mintAssets.brief: Six stellar memory cores, constellation structures, and flybys.
A sharp-twinkle PBR surface for stellar cores.

experience: Keep entries and media in this browser.
Search, filter, follow connections, or use a timeline.
prompt.visualDirection: Near-black observatory, warm stars, orbital lines, and editorial type.

thumbnail.alt: A dark memory observatory with warm connected stars, orbital trails, and the heading Where, when, and who we remember.

social.title: Memory Constellation
social.description: Keep a private local archive and rediscover its people, places, and moments as an interactive constellation.

image.alt: A dark memory observatory with warm connected stars, orbital trails, and the heading Where, when, and who we remember.
